title: 抽离 Workbench History Pane
goal: 把主工作区历史页从 DecisionWorkbench 中抽离为独立组件，降低主工作台文件体积，并保持测评历史、保存视图、矩阵和 run comparison 行为不变。
scope: 迁移历史页 saved views、filters、run matrix、run list、comparison panel 和逐 case 结果详情
导出 HistoryRunFilters，DecisionWorkbench 继续负责筛选状态、API 查询和保存视图 mutation
保留现有 CSS class、文案、ARIA label、筛选字段和 comparison 动作
记录中文规格、执行计划和任务日志
out_of_scope: 改变 run matrix、saved view 或 comparison 交互
调整 API、数据库模型、权限策略或 E2E 语义
verification: test -f apps/web/components/history/workbench-history-pane.tsx -> failed before implementation, confirming missing component boundary
rg -n "function HistoryPane\\(" apps/web/components/decision-workbench.tsx -> found old inline HistoryPane before implementation
cd apps/web && npm run typecheck -> passed
cd apps/web && npm run build -> passed
cd apps/api && uv run pytest -> 90 passed
